title: Multicultural Celebration
description: A vibrant celebration honoring the diverse cultural backgrounds and identities of CCA's graduating class. Join us for performances, food, and community.
longDescription: The Multicultural Celebration is an annual tradition that honors the rich cultural diversity of CCA's graduating students. This joyful evening features performances, cultural presentations, and a communal meal. All graduates, their families, and the CCA community are welcome to attend this special pre-commencement gathering.
